name: Macmahon Holdings Limited
description: Macmahon Holdings Limited is an Australian-based mining services and construction company founded in 1963. Headquartered in Perth, the company provides a comprehensive suite of surface and underground mining, as well as civil infrastructure services, to clients throughout Australia and Southeast Asia. Listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX: MAH), Macmahon has established a long-standing reputation for delivering end-to-end mining solutions, ranging from initial excavation and site development to ongoing operational support, serving a diverse portfolio of mining projects across the region.
